form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months favourite; ran on from midfield and won by a neck at this track Bm66 March 29 over 1100m defeating Soobooco carrying 60kg at $2.60. Previously second-up favourite; scored a big 4 len win at Gunnedah Mdn-Sw September 27 over 1250m defeating Taga Smile carrying 59kg at $1.50. Has the right credentials and is the one they have to beat.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up 10th of 12 at Tamworth Bm66 on February 13 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Tough Guy carrying 62kg at $101. Last start raced on the speed throughout before fading second last of 12 at Moree Ctry Bm66 on March 17 over 1200m, 11 len behind Tough Guy carrying 62kg at $91. Looks safely held.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of four months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second last of 8 at Goulburn Cl3 December 19 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Stormfield with 58kg at $8. Previously first up; third of 10 at Tamworth Cl3 August 15 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Occult with 54kg at $31. Looks very hard to beat.
